creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
A side note re: the WWW URL, I'm also aware of 
<https://sourceforge.net/projects/ntfs-3g/>. 

Glancing _very_ briefly at e.g. authors' names at <https://sourceforge.net/p/ntfs-3g/ntfs-3g/ci/edge/tree/>, I suspect that whilst the SourceForge area is comparable, GitHub is the better point of reference for source code etc..

(Here, I may be confused … memories of the catacombae area of SourceForge – from around 2010, when was still a user of Mac OS X; <https://macntfs-3g.blogspot.com/2010/10/ntfs-3g-for-mac-os-x-2010102.html>.)
